---
title: "README: Unused Data Wrangling and Exploration"
output: html_document
---


These documents were created as a way to start exploring and organizing our 
Kangaroo Rat Data before the best way to wrangle the data had been determined.
Some of the Quarto documents use a slightly different data set than what
was used for the analysis, as more data was added after the fact. 

Some components from the Data Wrangling Mackenzie qmd were used in the creation 
of the final data frame (located in the output folder).
